Download

Appearance

FracturePhysics destruction for GameMaker

Break objects into Box2D physics pieces using a variety of fracture patterns.

What is Fracture?
Get Started

💥 Effortless Integration

A single function call fractures any instance and returns the resulting physics bodies. Drawing and cleanup are fully automatic, and it works even in non-physics games.

🧩 Wide Shape & Pattern Coverage

Break boxes, circles, and convex sprites using a variety of patterns - Grid, Brick, Diamond, Hex, Radial, Slice, and Voronoi.

⚡ High-Performance Rendering

Each fracture generates a single frozen vertex buffer shared across all its pieces. No overhead from surfaces, baking sprites, or drawing live primitive geometry.

🌫️ Automatic Fading

Pieces can automatically fade out and destroy themselves after settling, with configurable delay and speed ranges.

🎯 Built-In Impulse

Apply an outward impulse to every piece at fracture time from any origin point, driving explosive visual effects with no extra setup.

🔧 Tweakable Physics

Set density, restitution, friction, and damping for all pieces through a chainable settings API, with automatic reset between fractures.

Fracture Team
